mechanism.claim: The CIA does not work for the people. It works for the people who own the banks.
mechanism.principle: An exempt-person network — descended from the Knights Templar's 12th-century papal immunity — runs through every modern central bank, intelligence service, and prosecutorial gate. The Epstein files are the modern receipt for the same mechanism: wealth protection through jurisdictional arbitrage, enforced by the state, concealed by the press.
cycle: Central bank creates private credit under state protection
Intelligence service is chartered to protect the bank's interests abroad
Exempt-person network emerges — individuals and properties immune to local law
Network finances and recruits political class in every major jurisdiction
Prosecutorial gatekeeping (DOJ/SDNY/NPA) decides which cases proceed
Media consolidation ensures the mechanism itself remains unreported

Private credit creation institutionalized under state protection — same architecture, secular form
Same architecture, US version: private bank, public liability, state enforcement

first_ep_chain.event: Epstein NPA — Southern District of New York

Two federal prison guards on overtime, both cameras 'malfunction,' no charges for anyone

spotlight.excerpt: I was assured we had the full set of [Epstein] records. It has come to my attention that the FBI never disclosed the existence of these files.
MCC surveillance video — 16 MP4 files, August 9-10 2019, bates 22153-22168. Both cameras 'malfunctioned' during the death window.
40 WAV files — 2006 FBI recordings that led to the 2008 NPA. The original case before the deal.
Black: Money laundering shell ESWW... an Epstein money laundering vehicle. Names Mnuchin, Koch, Bannon, Parscale, Urban in Trump-adjacent financial entanglement.
Epstein status memo to Office of the Deputy Attorney General, May 10 2019. Two months before public re-arrest. ODAG was aware.
Epstein & Musk helicopter to Little Saint James, Nov 24-25 2012, with Talulah Riley. Documented in The Compound v3 flight-log analysis.

entries.excerpt: Epstein email to Stacie Meador (Mark Zeff interior designer), September 2010. Guest bedroom rendering styles — physical network receipts.
53-page Non-Prosecution Agreement, Southern District of New York. Sealed from victims. Prosecutorial gate.
Bondi letter admits FBI never disclosed the files. House Oversight holds EFTA R1+R2 but has not released full set. Senate Judiciary failed to compel testimony.

method: OCR of 10,715 EFTA PDF files. Power-class tagging by entity-mention across all documents. Co-occurrence measured as two power classes appearing in the same document. Hand-tagged 170 documents for actor names (DiIorio batch, flight logs, MCC records). All claims anchored to a specific bates number.

items.note: 18,000 sq ft hacienda + verified excavated basement with massage room / jacuzzi / exercise suite, 7-bay garage, Santa Fe railroad caboose. Five separate printable volumes. As-built geometry per DOJ Risk Management Records.
